items.name: Classic Burger
items.description: Juicy hand-pressed patty, secret house sauce, and charred buns.
items.imageAlt: Classic beef burger with lettuce and tomato

items.name: The Inferno Burger
items.description: Double beef patty, ghost pepper jack, charred jalapeños, and our signature Agni lava sauce.
items.imageAlt: A thick juicy beef burger with melting cheese and spicy sauce

items.name: Citrus Fire Chicken
items.description: Buttermilk fried chicken, lemon-zest slaw, and a mild peri-peri glaze on brioche.
items.imageAlt: Golden fried chicken breast burger with crisp lettuce

items.name: Spicy Fish Fry
items.description: Fresh catch marinated in Agni's special coastal masala blend.
items.imageAlt: Spicy coastal fried fish fillet with local spices

items.name: Agni's Signature Fish
items.description: Secret malvani rub, charcoal grilled to perfection.

items.name: Dynamite Prawns
items.description: Jumbo prawns battered and tossed in a creamy, sriracha-infused dynamite sauce.
items.imageAlt: Crispy breaded shrimp with a spicy dipping sauce

items.name: Chicken Tenders
items.description: Double-breaded for extra crunch. Served with hot garlic mayo.
items.imageAlt: Golden crispy chicken tenders with dip

items.name: Dynamite Strips
items.description: Crispy breast strips with ghost pepper mayo.

items.name: Peri Peri Fries
items.description: Hand-cut potato fries dusted with African Bird's Eye chili.
items.imageAlt: Fries tossed in red peri peri spice powder

items.name: Masala Dust Fries
items.description: Twice-fried with our secret blend of coastal spices.
items.imageAlt: Golden fries sprinkled with red masala spice

items.name: Volcano Loaded
items.description: Smothered in melted cheddar and Agni hot sauce.
items.imageAlt: Loaded fries with melted cheese and spicy sauce

items.name: The Coastal Ember Feast
items.description: Two pieces of crispy fire-grilled fish, four signature spicy wings, hand-cut cajun fries, and our house-made lemon-garlic aioli.
items.imageAlt: Close up of a gourmet fried chicken and fish combo platter
